Continuously syncs team memberships\\n275: - Removes users from teams when removed from groups\\n276: - Updates team memberships when groups change\\n277: \\n278: \",\"endLine\":278,\"startLine\":274},{\"content\":\"267: \\n268: - Creates Grafana teams for new identity provider groups\\n269: - Maps users to appropriate teams\\n270: - Removes users from teams when group membership changes\\n271: \\n272: \",\"endLine\":272,\"startLine\":267},{\"content\":\"32: - **Manage existing users** by linking them with identity provider identities\\n33: - **Automate team lifecycle** by automatically creating teams when groups are added, updating team memberships, and deleting teams when groups are removed\\n34: - **Maintain security** through automated deprovisioning\\n35: \",\"endLine\":35,\"startLine\":32}],\"file\":\"docs/sources/setup-grafana/configure-access/configure-scim-provisioning/manage-users-teams/_index.md\",\"repo\":\"github.com/grafana/grafana\",\"type\":\"file\",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/grafana/grafana/-/blob/docs/sources/setup-grafana/configure-access/configure-scim-provisioning/manage-users-teams/_index.md\"},{\"chunks\":[{\"content\":\"184: \\n185: Team sync is a feature that allows you to synchronize teams or groups from your authentication provider with teams in Grafana. This means that users of specific teams or groups in LDAP, OAuth, or SAML will be automatically added or removed as members of co ... [line truncated]\\n186: \\n187: \",\"endLine\":187,\"startLine\":184},{\"content\":\"54: \\n55: ### Users in Grafana teams\\n56: \\n57: You can organize users into [teams](../../administration/team-management/) and assign them roles and permissions reflecting the current organization. For example, instead of assigning five users access to the same dashboard, you can create a team of those  ... [line truncated]\\n58: \\n59: A user can belong to multiple teams and be a member or an administrator for a given team. Team members inherit permissions from the team but cannot edit the team itself. Team administrators can add members to a team and update its settings, such as the tea ... [line truncated]\\n60: \\n61: Teams are a perfect solution for working with a subset of users. Teams can share resources with other teams.\\n62: \\n63: \",\"endLine\":63,\"startLine\":54},{\"content\":\"33: \\n34: ## Internal vs external users\\n35: \\n36: \",\"endLine\":36,\"startLine\":33}],\"file\":\"docs/sources/setup-grafana/configure-access/_index.md\",\"repo\":\"github.com/grafana/grafana\",\"type\":\"file\",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/grafana/grafana/-/blob/docs/sources/setup-grafana/configure-access/_index.md\"},{\"chunks\":[{\"content\":\"5: type GetUserTeamsApiArg = {\\n3551:   userId: number;\\n3552: \",\"endLine\":3552,\"startLine\":3548}],\"file\":\"packages/grafana-api-clients/src/clients/rtkq/legacy/endpoints.gen.ts\",\"repo\":\"github.com/grafana/grafana\",\"type\":\"file\",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/grafana/grafana/-/blob/packages/grafana-api-clients/src/clients/rtkq/legacy/endpoints.gen.ts\"},{\"chunks\":[{\"content\":\"38: - **Automated user provisioning**: Automatically create, update, and disable users in Grafana when changes occur in your identity provider\\n39: - **Automated team lifecycle management**: Automatically create teams when new groups are added, update team memberships, and delete teams when groups are removed from your identity provider\\n40: - **Reduced administrative overhead**: Eliminate manual user management tasks and reduce the risk of human error\\n41: \",\"endLine\":41,\"startLine\":38},{\"content\":\"173: - **Comprehensive user and team automation**: SCIM provides full automation for user and team provisioning, while role management is handled separately through Role Sync\\n174: - **Dynamic team creation**: Teams are created automatically based on identity provider groups\\n175: - **Near real-time synchronization**: Changes in the identity provider are reflected based on the provider synchronization schedule\\n176: \",\"endLine\":176,\"startLine\":173},{\"content\":\"52: \\n53: ### Align SAML identifier with SCIM `externalId`\\n54: \\n55: When you use SAML with SCIM provisioning, align the SCIM `externalId` with the SAML user identifier. Use a stable IdP attribute (for example, Entra ID `user.objectid`) as the SCIM `externalId`, and send that same value as a SAML claim. Configure Grafana to ... [line truncated]\\n56: \\n57: If the SAML identifier and SCIM `externalId` differ, Grafana may not link the authenticated user to the intended SCIM profile, which can result in incorrect access. Verify your IdP sends a stable, unique identifier and that it matches the SCIM `externalId` ... [line truncated]\\n58: \\n59: \",\"endLine\":59,\"startLine\":52}],\"file\":\"docs/sources/setup-grafana/configure-access/configure-scim-provisioning/_index.md\",\"repo\":\"github.com/grafana/grafana\",\"type\":\"file\",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/grafana/grafana/-/blob/docs/sources/setup-grafana/configure-access/configure-scim-provisioning/_index.md\"},{\"chunks\":[{\"content\":\"54: \\tFetchSyncedUser bool\\n55: \\t// SyncTeams will sync the groups from identity to teams in grafana, enterprise only feature\\n56: \\tSyncTeams bool\\n57: \\t// SyncOrgRoles will sync the roles from the identity to orgs in grafana\\n58: \",\"endLine\":58,\"startLine\":54},{\"content\":\"71: type FetchPermissionsParams struct {\\n72: \\t// RestrictedActions will restrict the permissions to only these Grafana-style actions\\n73: \\tRestrictedActions []string\\n74: \\t// K8sRestrictedActions will restrict the permissions to only the Grafana actions\\n75: \\t// that the Kubernetes-style permission strings translate to\\n76: \\tK8sRestrictedActions []string\\n77: \\t// AllowedActions will be added to the identity permissions\\n78: \",\"endLine\":78,\"startLine\":71},{\"content\":\"21: const (\\n22: \\tClientAPIKey       = \\\"auth.client.api-key\\\" // #nosec G101\\n23: \\tClientAnonymous    = \\\"auth.client.anonymous\\\"\\n24: \",\"endLine\":24,\"startLine\":21}],\"file\":\"pkg/services/authn/authn.go\",\"repo\":\"github.com/grafana/grafana\",\"type\":\"file\",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/grafana/grafana/-/blob/pkg/services/authn/authn.go\"}]}"

  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "1: package org\n2: \n3: import (\n4: \t\"errors\"\n5: \t\"strings\"\n6: \t\"time\"\n7: \n8: \t\"github.com/grafana/grafana/pkg/apimachinery/errutil\"\n9: \t\"github.com/grafana/grafana/pkg/apimachinery/identity\"\n10: \t\"github.com/grafana/grafana/pkg/services/search/model\"\n11: )\n12: \n13: // Typed errors\n14: var (\n15: \tErrOrgNameTaken                            = errors.New(\"organization name is taken\")\n16: \tErrLastOrgAdmin                            = errors.New(\"cannot remove last organization admin\")\n17: \tErrOrgUserNotFound                         = errors.New(\"cannot find the organization user\")\n18: \tErrOrgUserAlreadyAdded                     = errors.New(\"user is already added to organization\")\n19: \tErrOrgNotFound                             = errutil.NotFound(\"org.notFound\", errutil.WithPublicMessage(\"organization not found\"))\n20: \tErrCannotChangeRoleForExternallySyncedUser = errutil.Forbidden(\"org.externallySynced\", errutil.WithPublicMessage(\"cannot change role for externally synced user\"))\n21: )\n22: \n23: type Org struct {\n24: \tID      int64 `xorm:\"pk autoincr 'id'\"`\n25: \tVersion int\n26: \tName    string\n27: \n28: \tAddress1 string\n29: \tAddress2 string\n30: \tCity     string\n31: \tZipCode  string\n32: \tState    string\n33: \tCountry  string\n34: \n35: \tCreated time.Time\n36: \tUpdated time.Time\n37: }\n38: type OrgUser struct {\n39: \tID      int64 `xorm:\"pk autoincr 'id'\"`\n40: \tOrgID   int64 `xorm:\"org_id\"`\n41: \tUserID  int64 `xorm:\"user_id\"`\n42: \tRole    RoleType\n43: \tCreated time.Time\n44: \tUpdated time.Time\n45: }\n46: \n47: type RoleType = identity.RoleType\n48: \n49: const (\n50: \tRoleNone   RoleType = identity.RoleNone\n51: \tRoleViewer RoleType = identity.RoleViewer\n52: \tRoleEditor RoleType = identity.RoleEditor\n53: \tRoleAdmin  RoleType = identity.RoleAdmin\n54: )\n55: \n56: type CreateOrgCommand struct {\n57: \tName string `json:\"name\" binding:\"Required\"`\n58: \n59: \t// initial admin user for account\n60: \tUserID int64 `json:\"-\" xorm:\"user_id\"`\n61: }\n62: \n63: type GetOrgIDForNewUserCommand struct {\n64: \tEmail        string\n65: \tLogin        string\n66: \tOrgID        int64\n67: \tOrgName      string\n68: \tSkipOrgSetup bool\n69: }\n70: \n71: type GetUserOrgListQuery struct {\n72: \tUserID int64 `xorm:\"user_id\"`\n73: }\n74: \n75: type UserOrgDTO struct {\n76: \tOrgID int64    `json:\"orgId\" xorm:\"org_id\"`\n77: \tName  string   `json:\"name\"`\n78: \tRole  RoleType `json:\"role\"`\n79: }\n80: \n81: type UpdateOrgCommand struct {\n82: \tName  string\n83: \tOrgId int64\n84: }\n85: \n86: type SearchOrgsQuery struct {\n87: \tQuery string\n88: \tName  string\n89: \tLimit int\n90: \tPage  int\n91: \tIDs   []int64 `xorm:\"ids\"`\n92: }\n93: \n94: type OrgDTO struct {\n95: \tID   int64  `json:\"id\" xorm:\"id\"`\n96: \tName string `json:\"name\"`\n97: }\n98: \n99: type GetOrgByIDQuery struct {\n100: \tID int64\n101: }\n102: \n103: type GetOrgByNameQuery struct {\n104: \tName string\n105: }\n106: \n107: type UpdateOrgAddressCommand struct {\n108: \tOrgID int64 `xorm:\"org_id\"`\n109: \tAddress\n110: }\n111: \n112: type Address struct {\n113: \tAddress1 string `json:\"address1\"`\n114: \tAddress2 string `json:\"address2\"`\n115: \tCity     string `json:\"city\"`\n116: \tZipCode  string `json:\"zipCode\"`\n117: \tState    string `json:\"state\"`\n118: \tCountry  string `json:\"country\"`\n119: }\n120: \n121: type DeleteOrgCommand struct {\n122: \tID int64 `xorm:\"id\"`\n123: }\n124: \n125: type AddOrgUserCommand struct {\n126: \tLoginOrEmail string   `json:\"loginOrEmail\" binding:\"Required\"`\n127: \tRole         RoleType `json:\"role\" binding:\"Required\"`\n128: \n129: \tOrgID  int64 `json:\"-\" xorm:\"org_id\"`\n130: \tUserID int64 `json:\"-\" xorm:\"user_id\"`\n131: \n132: \t// internal use: avoid adding service accounts to orgs via user routes\n133: \tAllowAddingServiceAccount bool `json:\"-\"`\n134: }\n135: \n136: type UpdateOrgUserCommand struct {\n137: \tRole RoleType `json:\"role\" binding:\"Required\"`\n138: \n139: \tOrgID  int64 `json:\"-\"`\n140: \tUserID int64 `json:\"-\"`\n141: }\n142: \n143: type OrgUserDTO struct {\n144: \tOrgID              int64           `json:\"orgId\" xorm:\"org_id\"`\n145: \tUserID             int64           `json:\"userId\" xorm:\"user_id\"`\n146: \tUID                string          `json:\"uid\" xorm:\"uid\"`\n147: \tEmail              string          `json:\"email\"`\n148: \tName               string          `json:\"name\"`\n149: \tAvatarURL          string          `json:\"avatarUrl\" xorm:\"avatar_url\"`\n150: \tLogin              string          `json:\"login\"`\n151: \tRole               string          `json:\"role\"`\n152: \tLastSeenAt         time.Time       `json:\"lastSeenAt\"`\n153: \tUpdated            time.Time       `json:\"-\"`\n154: \tCreated            time.Time       `json:\"-\"`\n155: \tLastSeenAtAge      string          `json:\"lastSeenAtAge\"`\n156: \tAccessControl      map[string]bool `json:\"accessControl,omitempty\"`\n157: \tIsDisabled         bool            `json:\"isDisabled\"`\n158: \tAuthLabels         []string        `json:\"authLabels\" xorm:\"-\"`\n159: \tIsExternallySynced bool            `json:\"isExternallySynced\"`\n160: \tIsProvisioned      bool            `json:\"isProvisioned\"`\n161: }\n162: \n163: type RemoveOrgUserCommand struct {\n164: \tUserID                   int64 `xorm:\"user_id\"`\n165: \tOrgID                    int64 `xorm:\"org_id\"`\n166: \tShouldDeleteOrphanedUser bool\n167: \tUserWasDeleted           bool\n168: }\n169: \n170: type GetOrgUsersQuery struct {\n171: \tUserID int64 `xorm:\"user_id\"`\n172: \tOrgID  int64 `xorm:\"org_id\"`\n173: \tQuery  string\n174: \tPage   int\n175: \tLimit  int\n176: \t// Flag used to allow oss edition to query users without access control\n177: \tDontEnforceAccessControl bool\n178: \n179: \tUser identity.Requester\n180: }\n181: \n182: type SearchOrgUsersQuery struct {\n183: \tUserID   int64 `xorm:\"user_id\"`\n184: \tOrgID    int64 `xorm:\"org_id\"`\n185: \tQuery    string\n186: \tPage identity.Requester\n193: }\n194: \n195: type SearchOrgUsersQueryResult struct {\n196: \tTotalCount int64         `json:\"totalCount\"`\n197: \tOrgUsers   []*OrgUserDTO `json:\"orgUsers\"`\n198: \tPage       int           `json:\"page\"`\n199: \tPerPage    int           `json:\"perPage\"`\n200: }\n201: \n202: type ByOrgName []*UserOrgDTO\n203: \n204: type OrgDetailsDTO struct {\n205: \tID      int64   `json:\"id\"`\n206: \tName    string  `json:\"name\"`\n207: \tAddress Address `json:\"address\"`\n208: }\n209: \n210: // Len returns the length of an array of organisations.\n211: func (o ByOrgName) Len() int {\n212: \treturn len(o)\n213: }\n214: \n215: // Swap swaps two indices of an array of organizations.\n216: func (o ByOrgName) Swap(i, j int) {\n217: \to[i], o[j] = o[j], o[i]\n218: }\n219: strings.ToLower(o[j].Name) {\n223: \t\treturn true\n224: \t}\n225: \n226: \treturn o[i].Name < o[j].Name\n227: }\n228: \n229: const (\n230: \tQuotaTargetSrv     string = \"org\"\n231: \tOrgQuotaTarget FilterIgnoreUser is used in a get / search teams query when the caller does not want to filter teams by user ID / membership\\n71: const FilterIgnoreUser int64 = 0\\n72: \\n73: type GetTeamIDsByUserQuery struct {\\n74: \\tOrgID  int64\\n75: \\tUserID int64 `json:\\\"userId\\\"`\\n76: }\\n77: \\n78: type GetTeamsByUserQuery struct {\\n79: \\tOrgID        int64\\n80: \\tUserID       int64 `json:\\\"userId\\\"`\\n81: \\tSignedInUser identity.Requester\\n82: }\\n83: \\n84: type SearchTeamsQuery struct {\\n85: \\tQuery        string\\n86: \\tName         string\\n87: \\tLimit `json:\\\"permission\\\"`\\n107: \\tAccessControl map[string]bool `json:\\\"accessControl\\\"`\\n108: }\\n109: \\n110: type PermissionType int\\n111: \\n112: const (\\n113: \\tPermissionTypeMember PermissionType = 0\\n114: \\tPermissionTypeAdmin  PermissionType = 4\\n115: )\\n116: \\n117: func (p PermissionType) String() string {\\n118: \\tif p == PermissionTypeAdmin {\\n119: \\t\\treturn \\\"Admin\\\"\\n120: \\t}\\n121: \\treturn \\\"Member\\\"\\n122: }\\n123: \\n124: type SearchTeamQueryResult struct {\\n125: \\tTotalCount int64      `json:\\\"totalCount\\\"`\\n126: \\tTeams \tErrNotAllowedToUpdateTeamInDifferentOrg = errors.New(\"user not allowed to update team in another org\")\n19: \n20: \tErrTeamMemberAlreadyAdded = errors.New(\"user is already added to this team\")\n21: )\n22: \n23: // Team model\n24: type Team struct {\n25: \tID            int64  `json:\"id\" xorm:\"pk autoincr 'id'\"`\n26: \tUID           string `json:\"uid\" xorm:\"uid\"`\n27: \tOrgID         int64  `json:\"orgId\" xorm:\"org_id\"`\n28: \tName          string `json:\"name\"`\n29: \tEmail         string `json:\"email\"`\n30: \tExternalUID   string `json:\"externalUID\" xorm:\"external_uid\"`\n31: \tIsProvisioned bool   `json:\"isProvisioned\" xorm:\"is_provisioned\"`\n32: \n33: \tCreated time.Time `json:\"created\"`\n34: \tUpdated time.Time `json:\"updated\"`\n35: }\n36: \n37: // ---------------------\n38: // COMMANDS\n39: \n40: type CreateTeamCommand struct {\n41: \tName          string `json:\"name\" binding:\"Required\"`\n42: \tEmail         string `json:\"email\"`\n43: \tExternalUID   string `json:\"-\"`\n44: \tIsProvisioned bool   `json:\"-\"`\n45: \tOrgID         int64  `json:\"-\"`\n46: }\n47: \n48: type UpdateTeamCommand struct {\n49: \tID          int64\n50: \tName        string\n51: \tEmail       string\n52: \tExternalUID string\n53: \tOrgID       int64 `json:\"-\"`\n54: }\n55: \n56: type DeleteTeamCommand struct {\n57: \tOrgID int64\n58: \tID    int64\n59: }\n60: \n61: type GetTeamByIDQuery struct {\n62: \tOrgID int64\n63: \t// Get team by ID or UID. If ID is set, UID is ignored.\n64: \tID           int64\n65: \tUID          string\n66: \tSignedInUser identity.Requester\n67: \tHiddenUsers  map[string]struct{}\n68: }\n69: \n70: // FilterIgnoreUser is used in a get / search teams query when the caller does not want to filter teams by user ID / membership\n71: const FilterIgnoreUser int64 = 0\n72: \n73: type GetTeamIDsByUserQuery struct {\n74: \tOrgID  int64\n75: \tUserID int64 `json:\"userId\"`\n76: }\n77: \n78: type GetTeamsByUserQuery struct {\n79: \tOrgID        int64\n80: \tUserID       int64 `json:\"userId\"`\n81: \tSignedInUser identity.Requester\n82: }\n83: \n84: type SearchTeamsQuery struct {\n85: \tQuery        string\n86: \tName         string\n87: \tLimit        int\n88: \tPage         int\n89: \tOrgID        int64 `xorm:\"org_id\"`\n90: \tSortOpts     []model.SortOption\n91: \tTeamIds      []int64\n92: \tSignedInUser identity.Requester\n93: \tHiddenUsers  map[string]struct{}\n94: }\n95: \n96: type TeamDTO struct {\n97: \tID            int64           `json:\"id\" xorm:\"id\"`\n98: \tUID           string          `json:\"uid\" xorm:\"uid\"`\n99: \tOrgID         int64           `json:\"orgId\" xorm:\"org_id\"`\n100: \tName          string          `json:\"name\"`\n101: \tEmail         string          `json:\"email\"`\n102: \tExternalUID   string          `json:\"externalUID\" xorm:\"external_uid\"`\n103: \tIsProvisioned bool            `json:\"isProvisioned\"`\n104: \tAvatarURL     string          `json:\"avatarUrl\"`\n105: \tMemberCount   int64           `json:\"memberCount\"`\n106: \tPermission    PermissionType  `json:\"permission\"`\n107: \tAccessControl map[string]bool `json:\"accessControl\"`\n108: }\n109: \n110: type PermissionType int\n111: \n112: const (\n113: \tPermissionTypeMember PermissionType = 0\n114: \tPermissionTypeAdmin  PermissionType = 4\n115: )\n116: \n117: func (p PermissionType) String() string {\n118: \tif p == PermissionTypeAdmin {\n119: \t\treturn \"Admin\"\n120: \t}\n121: \treturn \"Member\"\n122: }\n123: \n124: type SearchTeamQueryResult struct {\n125: \tTotalCount int64      `json:\"totalCount\"`\n126: \tTeams      []*TeamDTO `json:\"teams\"`\n127: \tPage       int        `json:\"page\"`\n128: \tPerPage    int        `json:\"perPage\"`\n129: }\n130: \n131: // TeamMember model\n132: type TeamMember struct {\n133: \tID         int64  `xorm:\"pk autoincr 'id'\"`\n134: \tUID        string `xorm:\"uid\"`\n135: \tOrgID      int64  `xorm:\"org_id\"`\n136: \tTeamID     int64  `xorm:\"team_id\"`\n137: \tUserID     int64  `xorm:\"user_id\"`\n138: \tExternal   bool   // Signals that the membership has been created by an external systems, such as LDAP\n139: \tPermission PermissionType\n140: \n141: \tCreated time.Time\n142: \tUpdated time.Time\n143: }\n144: \n145: // ---------------------\n146: // COMMANDS\n147: \n148: type AddTeamMemberCommand struct {\n149: \tUserID     int64          `json:\"userId\" binding:\"Required\"`\n150: \tPermission PermissionType `json:\"-\"`\n151: }\n152: \n153: type UpdateTeamMemberCommand struct {\n154: \tPermission PermissionType `json:\"permission\"`\n155: }\n156: \n157: type SetTeamMembershipsCommand struct {\n158: \tMembers []string `json:\"members\"`\n159: \tAdmins  []string `json:\"admins\"`\n160: }\n161: \n162: type RemoveTeamMemberCommand struct {\n163: \tOrgID  int64 `json:\"-\"`\n164: \tUserID int64\n165: \tTeamID int64\n166: }\n167: \n168: // ----------------------\n169: // QUERIES\n170: \n171: type GetTeamMembersQuery struct {\n172: \tOrgID        int64\n173: \tTeamID       int64\n174: \tTeamUID      string\n175: \tUserID       int64\n176: \tExternal     bool\n177: \tSignedInUser identity.Requester\n178: }\n179: \n180: // ----------------------\n181: // Projections and DTOs\n182: \n183: type TeamMemberDTO struct {\n184: \tUID        string         `json:\"uid\" xorm:\"uid\"`\n185: \tOrgID      int64          `json:\"orgId\" xorm:\"org_id\"`\n186: \tTeamID     int64          `json:\"teamId\" xorm:\"team_id\"`\n187: \tTeamUID    string         `json:\"teamUID\" xorm:\"team_uid\"`\n188: \tUserID     int64          `json:\"userId\" xorm:\"user_id\"`\n189: \tUserUID    string         `json:\"userUID\" xorm:\"user_uid\"`\n190: \tExternal   bool           `json:\"-\"`\n191: \tAuthModule string         `json:\"auth_module\"`\n192: \tEmail      string         `json:\"email\"`\n193: \tName       string         `json:\"name\"`\n194: \tLogin      string         `json:\"login\"`\n195: \tAvatarURL  string         `json:\"avatarUrl\" xorm:\"avatar_url\"`\n196: \tLabels     []string       `json:\"labels\"`\n197: \tPermission PermissionType `json:\"permission\"`\n198: }\n199: ",

  }
}

context.Context, orgID, userID int64, external bool, bypassCache bool) ([]*TeamMemberDTO, error)\\n23: \\tGetTeamMembers(ctx context.Context, query *GetTeamMembersQuery) ([]*TeamMemberDTO, error)\\n24: \\tRegisterDelete(query string)\\n25: }\\n26: \\n27: func UIDToIDHandler(teamService Service) func(ctx context.Context, orgID int64, resourceID string) (string, error) {\\n28: \\treturn func(ctx context.Context, orgID int64, teamIDorUID string) (string, error) {\\n29: \\t\\t// if teamIDorUID is empty or is an integer, we assume it's a team ID, and we don't need to resolve it\\n30: \\t\\t_, err := strconv.ParseInt(teamIDorUID, 10, 64)\\n31: \\t\\tif teamIDorUID == \\\"\\\" || err == nil {\\n32: \\t\\t\\treturn teamIDorUID, nil\\n33: \\t\\t}\\n34: \\t\\tteam, err := strconv.FormatInt(team.ID, 10), err\\n40: \\t}\\n41: }\\n42: \\n43: func MiddlewareTeamUIDResolver(teamService Service, paramName string) web.Handler {\\n44: \\thandler := UIDToIDHandler(teamService)\\n45: \\n46: \\treturn func(c *contextmodel.ReqContext) {\\n47: \\t\\t// Get team id from request, fetch team and replace team UID with team ID\\n48: \\t\\tteamIDorUID := web.Params(c.Req)[paramName]\\n49: \\t\\tid, err := handler(c.Req.Context(), c.OrgID, teamIDorUID)\\n50: \\t\\tif err == nil {\\n51: \\t\\t\\tgotParams := web.Params(c.Req)\\n52: \\t\\t\\tgotParams[paramName] = id\\n53: \\t\\t\\tweb.SetURLParams(c.Req, gotParams)\\n54: \\t\\t} else {\\n55: \\t\\t\\tc.JsonApiErr(http.StatusNotFound, \\\"Not found\\\", nil)\\n56: \\t\\t}\\n57: \\t}\\n58: }\\n59: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec@7b5876467dc156dd3117dd0b3c15f994100e9597/-/blob/pkg/services/team/team.go\"}",

    "content": "1: package team\n2: \n3: import (\n4: \t\"context\"\n5: \t\"net/http\"\n6: \t\"strconv\"\n7: \n8: \tcontextmodel \"github.com/grafana/grafana/pkg/services/contexthandler/model\"\n9: \t\"github.com/grafana/grafana/pkg/web\"\n10: )\n11: \n12: type Service interface {\n13: \tCreateTeam(ctx context.Context, cmd *CreateTeamCommand) (Team, error)\n14: \tUpdateTeam(ctx context.Context, cmd *UpdateTeamCommand) error\n15: \tDeleteTeam(ctx context.Context, cmd *DeleteTeamCommand) error\n16: \tSearchTeams(ctx context.Context, query *SearchTeamsQuery) (SearchTeamQueryResult, error)\n17: \tGetTeamByID(ctx context.Context, query *GetTeamByIDQuery) (*TeamDTO, error)\n18: \tGetTeamsByUser(ctx context.Context, query *GetTeamsByUserQuery) ([]*TeamDTO, error)\n19: \tGetTeamIDsByUser(ctx context.Context, query *GetTeamIDsByUserQuery) ([]int64, error)\n20: \tIsTeamMember(ctx context.Context, orgId int64, teamId int64, userId int64) (bool, error)\n21: \tRemoveUsersMemberships(tx context.Context, userID int64) error\n22: \tGetUserTeamMemberships(ctx context.Context, orgID, userID int64, external bool, bypassCache bool) ([]*TeamMemberDTO, error)\n23: \tGetTeamMembers(ctx context.Context, query *GetTeamMembersQuery) ([]*TeamMemberDTO, error)\n24: \tRegisterDelete(query string)\n25: }\n26: \n27: func UIDToIDHandler(teamService Service) func(ctx context.Context, orgID int64, resourceID string) (string, error) {\n28: \treturn func(ctx context.Context, orgID int64, teamIDorUID string) (string, error) {\n29: \t\t// if teamIDorUID is empty or is an integer, we assume it's a team ID, and we don't need to resolve it\n30: \t\t_, err := strconv.ParseInt(teamIDorUID, 10, 64)\n31: \t\tif teamIDorUID == \"\" || err == nil {\n32: \t\t\treturn teamIDorUID, nil\n33: \t\t}\n34: \t\tteam, err := teamService.GetTeamByID(ctx, &GetTeamByIDQuery{UID: teamIDorUID, OrgID: orgID})\n35: \t\tif err != nil {\n36: \t\t\treturn \"\", err\n37: \t\t}\n38: \n39: \t\treturn strconv.FormatInt(team.ID, 10), err\n40: \t}\n41: }\n42: \n43: func MiddlewareTeamUIDResolver(teamService Service, paramName string) web.Handler {\n44: \thandler := UIDToIDHandler(teamService)\n45: \n46: \treturn func(c *contextmodel.ReqContext) {\n47: \t\t// Get team id from request, fetch team and replace team UID with team ID\n48: \t\tteamIDorUID := web.Params(c.Req)[paramName]\n49: \t\tid, err := handler(c.Req.Context(), c.OrgID, teamIDorUID)\n50: \t\tif err == nil {\n51: \t\t\tgotParams := web.Params(c.Req)\n52: \t\t\tgotParams[paramName] = id\n53: \t\t\tweb.SetURLParams(c.Req, gotParams)\n54: \t\t} else {\n55: \t\t\tc.JsonApiErr(http.StatusNotFound, \"Not found\", nil)\n56: \t\t}\n57: \t}\n58: }\n59: ",

log.Logger\\n38: \\tresolvers accesscontrol.Resolvers\\n39: }\\n40: \\n41: func (a *AccessControl) Evaluate(ctx context.Context, user identity.Requester, evaluator accesscontrol.Evaluator) (bool, \\t}\\n60: \\n61: \\t// If the user is in no organization, then the evaluation must happen based on the user's global permissions\\n62: \\tpermissions := user.GetPermissions()\\n63: \\tif set\\\", evaluator)\\n68: \\t\\treturn false, nil\\n69: \\t}\\n70: \\n71: \\ta.debug(ctx, user, \\\"Evaluating permissions\\\", evaluator)\\n72: \\t// Test evaluation without scope resolver first, resolvedEvaluator.Evaluate(permissions), nil\\n87: }\\n88: \\n89: func (a *AccessControl) RegisterScopeAttributeResolver(prefix string, resolver accesscontrol.ScopeAttributeResolver) {\\n90: \\ta.resolvers.AddScopeAttributeResolver(prefix, resolver)\\n91: }\\n92: \\n93: func (a *AccessControl) WithoutResolvers() accesscontrol.AccessControl {\\n94: \\treturn &AccessControl{\\n95:     "content": "1: package acimpl\n2: \n3: import (\n4: \t\"context\"\n5: \t\"errors\"\n6: \n7: \t\"github.com/prometheus/client_golang/prometheus\"\n8: \t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel\"\n9: \n10: \t\"github.com/grafana/grafana/pkg/apimachinery/identity\"\n11: \t\"github.com/grafana/grafana/pkg/infra/log\"\n12: \t\"github.com/grafana/grafana/pkg/infra/metrics\"\n13: \t\"github.com/grafana/grafana/pkg/services/accesscontrol\"\n14: \t\"github.com/grafana/grafana/pkg/services/featuremgmt\"\n15: )\n16: \n17: var tracer = otel.Tracer(\"github.com/grafana/grafana/pkg/services/accesscontrol/acimpl\")\n18: \n19: var _ accesscontrol.AccessControl = new(AccessControl)\n20: \n21: func ProvideAccessControl(features featuremgmt.FeatureToggles) *AccessControl {\n22: \tlogger := log.New(\"accesscontrol\")\n23: \n24: \treturn &AccessControl{\n25: \t\tfeatures,\n26: \t\tlogger,\n27: \t\taccesscontrol.NewResolvers(logger),\n28: \t}\n29: }\n30: \n31: func ProvideAccessControlTest() *AccessControl {\n32: \treturn ProvideAccessControl(featuremgmt.WithFeatures())\n33: }\n34: \n35: type AccessControl struct {\n36: \tfeatures  featuremgmt.FeatureToggles\n37: \tlog       log.Logger\n38: \tresolvers accesscontrol.Resolvers\n39: }\n40: \n41: func (a *AccessControl) Evaluate(ctx context.Context, user identity.Requester, evaluator accesscontrol.Evaluator) (bool, error) {\n42: \tctx, span := tracer.Start(ctx, \"accesscontrol.acimpl.Evaluate\")\n43: \tdefer span.End()\n44: \n45: \treturn a.evaluate(ctx, user, evaluator)\n46: }\n47: \n48: func (a *AccessControl) evaluate(ctx context.Context, user identity.Requester, evaluator accesscontrol.Evaluator) (bool, error) {\n49: \tctx, span := tracer.Start(ctx, \"accesscontrol.acimpl.evaluate\")\n50: \tdefer span.End()\n51: \n52: \ttimer := prometheus.NewTimer(metrics.MAccessEvaluationsSummary)\n53: \tdefer timer.ObserveDuration()\n54: \tmetrics.MAccessEvaluationCount.Inc()\n55: \n56: \tif user == nil || user.IsNil() {\n57: \t\ta.log.Warn(\"No entity set for access control evaluation\")\n58: \t\treturn false, nil\n59: \t}\n60: \n61: \t// If the user is in no organization, then the evaluation must happen based on the user's global permissions\n62: \tpermissions := user.GetPermissions()\n63: \tif user.GetOrgID() == accesscontrol.NoOrgID {\n64: \t\tpermissions = user.GetGlobalPermissions()\n65: \t}\n66: \tif len(permissions) == 0 {\n67: \t\ta.debug(ctx, user, \"No permissions set\", evaluator)\n68: \t\treturn false, nil\n69: \t}\n70: \n71: \ta.debug(ctx, user, \"Evaluating permissions\", evaluator)\n72: \t// Test evaluation without scope resolver first, this will prevent 403 for wildcard scopes when resource does not exist\n73: \tif evaluator.Evaluate(permissions) {\n74: \t\treturn true, nil\n75: \t}\n76: \n77: \tresolvedEvaluator, err := evaluator.MutateScopes(ctx, a.resolvers.GetScopeAttributeMutator(user.GetOrgID()))\n78: \tif err != nil {\n79: \t\tif errors.Is(err, accesscontrol.ErrResolverNotFound) {\n80: \t\t\treturn false, nil\n81: \t\t}\n82: \t\treturn false, err\n83: \t}\n84: \n85: \ta.debug(ctx, user, \"Evaluating resolved permissions\", resolvedEvaluator)\n86: \treturn resolvedEvaluator.Evaluate(permissions), nil\n87: }\n88: \n89: func (a *AccessControl) RegisterScopeAttributeResolver(prefix string, resolver accesscontrol.ScopeAttributeResolver) {\n90: \ta.resolvers.AddScopeAttributeResolver(prefix, resolver)\n91: }\n92: \n93: func (a *AccessControl) WithoutResolvers() accesscontrol.AccessControl {\n94: \treturn &AccessControl{\n95: \t\tfeatures:  a.features,\n96: \t\tlog:       a.log,\n97: \t\tresolvers: accesscontrol.NewResolvers(a.log),\n98: \t}\n99: }\n100: \n101: func (a *AccessControl) debug(ctx context.Context, ident identity.Requester, msg string, eval accesscontrol.Evaluator) {\n102: \tctx, span := tracer.Start(ctx, \"accesscontrol.acimpl.debug\")\n103: \tdefer span.End()\n104: \n105: \ta.log.FromContext(ctx).Debug(msg, \"id\", ident.GetID(), \"orgID\", ident.GetOrgID(), \"permissions\", eval.GoString())\n106: }\n107: ",

  }
}

\"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/api/org_users.go\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/api/folder_permission.go\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"pkg/services/dashboards/service/dashboard_service.go\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/sqlstore/migrations/accesscontrol/team_membership.go\"}\n  ],\n  \"symbols\": [\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/org/model.go\", \"symbol\": \"OrgUser\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/org/model.go\", \"symbol\": \"RoleType\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/org/org.go\", \"symbol\": \"Service\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/team/model.go\", \"symbol\": \"TeamMember\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/team/model.go\", \"symbol\": \"Team\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/team/team.go\", \"symbol\": \"Service\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/accesscontrol/accesscontrol.go\", \"symbol\": \"Service\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/accesscontrol/accesscontrol.go\", \"symbol\": \"AccessControl\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/accesscontrol/models.go\", \"symbol\": \"Permission\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/accesscontrol/models.go\", \"symbol\": \"Role\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/accesscontrol/evaluator.go\", \"symbol\": \"Evaluator\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/accesscontrol/acimpl/accesscontrol.go\", \"symbol\": \"AccessControl\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/authz/rbac/service.go\", \"symbol\": \"Service\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/folder/model.go\", \"symbol\": \"Folder\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/folder/folderimpl/folder.go\", \"symbol\": \"Service\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/ldap/ldap_groups.go\", \"symbol\": \"Service\"}\n  ],\n  \"chain\": [\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/accesscontrol/acimpl/accesscontrol.go\", \"symbol\": \"Evaluate\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/authz/rbac/service.go\", \"symbol\": \"CheckPermissions\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/accesscontrol/resourcepermissions/service.go\", \"symbol\": \"GetPermissions\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/folder/folderimpl/folder.go\", \"symbol\": \"GetChildren\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/ldap/ldap_groups.go\", \"symbol\": \"GetTeamGroupsForUser\"}\n  ],\n  \"text\": \"The Grafana organization/team/user permission hierarchy is implemented across multiple services and layers:\\n\\n## Core Models and Services\\n\\n1. **Organization User Role Assignment**: `pkg/services/org/model.go` defines the `OrgUser` struct with a `RoleType` field that determines user's organization-level role (Viewer, Editor, Admin). The `pkg/services/org/org.go` service interface defines methods `AddOrgUser`, `UpdateOrgUser`, and `RemoveOrgUser` for managing org membership and roles.\\n\\n2. **Team Model and Membership**: `pkg/services/team/model.go` defines `Team` and `TeamMember` models. `TeamMember` tracks team membership with an `External` boolean flag to mark LDAP/OAuth synced members, and a `Permission` field for team-level admin/member roles. The team service in `pkg/services/team/team.go` provides methods like `CreateTeam`, `GetTeamMembers`, and membership management.\\n\\n## Team Group Synchronization\\n\\n3. **Team Group Sync**: The codebase implements external group synchronization through:\\n   - `pkg/services/team/teamapi/team_members.go` handles team member management with support for externally synced members\\n   - `pkg/services/ldap/ldap_groups.go` implements LDAP group synchronization for teams, extracting group memberships from LDAP\\n   - `pkg/services/ldap/model.go` defines `LDAPGroupToGrafanaTeamMap` for mapping LDAP groups to Grafana teams\\n   - `pkg/services/login/model.go` defines `ExternalUserInfo` with `Groups` and `SkipTeamSync` fields for OAuth/SAML team provisioning\\n   - `pkg/services/ldap/service/ldap_service.go` handles active LDAP synchronization of team memberships\\n\\n## RBAC Fine-Grained Permission Evaluation\\n\\n4. **Permission Evaluation Architecture**: The RBAC evaluation chain involves:\\n   - `pkg/services/accesscontrol/accesscontrol.go` defines the core `AccessControl` interface with `Evaluate()` method\\n   - `pkg/services/accesscontrol/acimpl/accesscontrol.go` implements permission evaluation by checking user permissions against evaluators\\n   - `pkg/services/accesscontrol/evaluator.go` implements `Evaluator` interface that builds permission checks from actions and scopes\\n   - `pkg/services/accesscontrol/models.go` defines `Permission`, `Role`, and `RoleDTO` models with action/scope matching\\n   - `pkg/services/authz/rbac/service.go` is the gRPC-based authz service implementing fine-grained RBAC with permission caching\\n   - `pkg/services/authz/rbac/mapper.go` maps permissions from the RBAC store to evaluatable permission sets\\n   - `pkg/services/authz/rbac/resolver.go` resolves scope attributes (like folder UIDs) in permission evaluation\\n\\n5. **RBAC Storage and Queries**: \\n   - `pkg/services/authz/rbac/store/store.go` provides the main store interface\\n   - `pkg/services/authz/rbac/store/permission_store.go` handles permission queries\\n   - `pkg/services/authz/rbac/store/folder_store.go` manages folder-specific permissions\\n   - SQL query templates (`permission_query.sql`, `folder_query.sql`, `basic_role_query.sql`) implement the actual permission evaluation logic\\n\\n## Folder Permission Inheritance\\n\\n6. **Folder Permissions Service**: \\n   - `pkg/services/folder/model.go` defines the `Folder` model\\n   - `pkg/services/folder/folderimpl/folder.go` and `pkg/services/folder/folderimpl/folder_unifiedstorage.go` implement folder service with permission checking\\n   - `pkg/services/folder/folderimpl/folder.go` has `getRootFolders()` and `getAvailableNonRootFolders()` that filter folders based on user permissions from the evaluator\\n   - `pkg/services/accesscontrol/ossaccesscontrol/folder.go` provides `FolderPermissionsService` that wraps resource permissions\\n\\n7. **Resource Permissions Service**:\\n   - `pkg/services/accesscontrol/resourcepermissions/service.go` implements `GetPermissions()` to retrieve resource-level permissions\\n   - `pkg/services/accesscontrol/resourcepermissions/store.go` queries the database for user/team/role permissions on resources\\n   - This service supports permissions at folder, dashboard, and team levels\\n\\n## API Handlers and Integration\\n\\n8. **API Handlers**:\\n   - `pkg/api/org_users.go` implements REST endpoints for org user management (add, update, remove org users)\\n   - `pkg/api/folder_permission.go` implements folder permission endpoints\\n   - `pkg/api/dashboard_permission.go` implements dashboard permission endpoints\\n   - `pkg/services/team/teamapi/team_members.go` implements team membership endpoints with permission enforcement\\n\\n9. **IAM Registry**: \\n   - `pkg/registry/apis/iam/register.go` registers IAM API handlers including team, user, and resource permission handlers\\n   - `pkg/registry/apis/iam/team/storage.go` implements K8s-style team storage for the API server\\n   - `pkg/registry/apis/iam/resourcepermission/models.go` defines resource permission objects for the API\\n\\n10. **Middleware and Authorization**:\\n    - `pkg/services/accesscontrol/middleware.go` wraps HTTP requests and enforces permission checks\\n    - `pkg/services/accesscontrol/authorizer.go` maps Kubernetes API verbs to RBAC actions and scopes\\n    - `pkg/registry/apis/iam/authorizer.go` authorizes API requests based on RBAC permissions\\n\\nThe complete hierarchy flows from: OrgUser role assignments \u2192 Team membership with external sync \u2192 Permission evaluation through RBAC evaluators \u2192 Folder/Dashboard permission inheritance, with each layer delegating to lower layers for actual permission checks and scope resolution.\"\n}\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/answer.json"
}
Output
{
  "content": "{\n  \"files\": [\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/org/model.go\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/org/org.go\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/org/orgimpl/org.go\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/org/orgimpl/store.go\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/team/model.go\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"pkg/services/team/team.go\", \"symbol\": \"Service\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/accesscontrol/accesscontrol.go\", \"symbol\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/accesscontrol/models.go\", \"symbol\": \"Permission\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/accesscontrol/models.go\", \"symbol\": \"Role\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/accesscontrol/evaluator.go\", \"symbol\": \"Evaluator\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/accesscontrol/acimpl/accesscontrol.go\", \"symbol\": \"AccessControl\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/authz/rbac/service.go\", \"symbol\": \"Service\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/folder/model.go\", \"symbol\": \"Folder\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/folder/folderimpl/folder.go\", \"symbol\": \"Service\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/ldap/ldap_groups.go\", \"symbol\": \"Service\"}\n  ],\n  \"chain\": [\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/accesscontrol/acimpl/accesscontrol.go\", \"symbol\": \"Evaluate\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/authz/rbac/service.go\", \"symbol\": \"CheckPermissions\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/accesscontrol/resourcepermissions/service.go\", \"symbol\": \"GetPermissions\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/folder/folderimpl/folder.go\", \"symbol\": \"GetChildren\"},\n    {\"repo\": \"github.com/sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec\", \"path\": \"pkg/services/ldap/ldap_groups.go\", \"symbol\": \"GetTeamGroupsForUser\"}\n  ],\n  \"text\": \"The Grafana organization/team/user permission hierarchy is implemented across multiple services and layers:\\n\\n## Core Models and Services\\n\\n1. **Organization User Role Assignment**: `pkg/services/org/model.go` defines the `OrgUser` struct with a `RoleType` field that determines user's organization-level role (Viewer, Editor, Admin). The `pkg/services/org/org.go` service interface defines methods `AddOrgUser`, `UpdateOrgUser`, and `RemoveOrgUser` for managing org membership and roles.\\n\\n2. **Team Model and Membership**: `pkg/services/team/model.go` defines `Team` and `TeamMember` models. `TeamMember` tracks team membership with an `External` boolean flag to mark LDAP/OAuth synced members, and a `Permission` field for team-level admin/member roles. The team service in `pkg/services/team/team.go` provides methods like `CreateTeam`, `GetTeamMembers`, and membership management.\\n\\n## Team Group Synchronization\\n\\n3. **Team Group Sync**: The codebase implements external group synchronization through:\\n   - `pkg/services/team/teamapi/team_members.go` handles team member management with support for externally synced members\\n   - `pkg/services/ldap/ldap_groups.go` implements LDAP group synchronization for teams, extracting group memberships from LDAP\\n   - `pkg/services/ldap/model.go` defines `LDAPGroupToGrafanaTeamMap` for mapping LDAP groups to Grafana teams\\n   - `pkg/services/login/model.go` defines `ExternalUserInfo` with `Groups` and `SkipTeamSync` fields for OAuth/SAML team provisioning\\n   - `pkg/services/ldap/service/ldap_service.go` handles active LDAP synchronization of team memberships\\n\\n## RBAC Fine-Grained Permission Evaluation\\n\\n4. **Permission Evaluation Architecture**: The RBAC evaluation chain involves:\\n   - `pkg/services/accesscontrol/accesscontrol.go` defines the core `AccessControl` interface with `Evaluate()` method\\n   - `pkg/services/accesscontrol/acimpl/accesscontrol.go` implements permission evaluation by checking user permissions against evaluators\\n   - `pkg/services/accesscontrol/evaluator.go` implements `Evaluator` interface that builds permission checks from actions and scopes\\n   - `pkg/services/accesscontrol/models.go` defines `Permission`, `Role`, and `RoleDTO` models with action/scope matching\\n   - `pkg/services/authz/rbac/service.go` is the gRPC-based authz service implementing fine-grained RBAC with permission caching\\n   - `pkg/services/authz/rbac/mapper.go` maps permissions from the RBAC store to evaluatable permission sets\\n   - `pkg/services/authz/rbac/resolver.go` resolves scope attributes (like folder UIDs) in permission evaluation\\n\\n5. **RBAC Storage and Queries**: \\n   - `pkg/services/authz/rbac/store/store.go` provides the main store interface\\n   - `pkg/services/authz/rbac/store/permission_store.go` handles permission queries\\n   - `pkg/services/authz/rbac/store/folder_store.go` manages folder-specific permissions\\n   - SQL query templates (`permission_query.sql`, `folder_query.sql`, `basic_role_query.sql`) implement the actual permission evaluation logic\\n\\n## Folder Permission Inheritance\\n\\n6. **Folder Permissions Service**: \\n   - `pkg/services/folder/model.go` defines the `Folder` model\\n   - `pkg/services/folder/folderimpl/folder.go` and `pkg/services/folder/folderimpl/folder_unifiedstorage.go` implement folder service with permission checking\\n   - `pkg/services/folder/folderimpl/folder.go` has `getRootFolders()` and `getAvailableNonRootFolders()` that filter folders based on user permissions from the evaluator\\n   - `pkg/services/accesscontrol/ossaccesscontrol/folder.go` provides `FolderPermissionsService` that wraps resource permissions\\n\\n7. **Resource Permissions Service**:\\n   - `pkg/services/accesscontrol/resourcepermissions/service.go` implements `GetPermissions()` to retrieve resource-level permissions\\n   - `pkg/services/accesscontrol/resourcepermissions/store.go` queries the database for user/team/role permissions on resources\\n   - This service supports permissions at folder, dashboard, and team levels\\n\\n## API Handlers and Integration\\n\\n8. **API Handlers**:\\n   - `pkg/api/org_users.go` implements REST endpoints for org user management (add, update, remove org users)\\n   - `pkg/api/folder_permission.go` implements folder permission endpoints\\n   - `pkg/api/dashboard_permission.go` implements dashboard permission endpoints\\n   - `pkg/services/team/teamapi/team_members.go` implements team membership endpoints with permission enforcement\\n\\n9. **IAM Registry**: \\n   - `pkg/registry/apis/iam/register.go` registers IAM API handlers including team, user, and resource permission handlers\\n   - `pkg/registry/apis/iam/team/storage.go` implements K8s-style team storage for the API server\\n   - `pkg/registry/apis/iam/resourcepermission/models.go` defines resource permission objects for the API\\n\\n10. **Middleware and Authorization**:\\n    - `pkg/services/accesscontrol/middleware.go` wraps HTTP requests and enforces permission checks\\n    - `pkg/services/accesscontrol/authorizer.go` maps Kubernetes API verbs to RBAC actions and scopes\\n    - `pkg/registry/apis/iam/authorizer.go` authorizes API requests based on RBAC permissions\\n\\nThe complete hierarchy flows from: OrgUser role assignments \u2192 Team membership with external sync \u2192 Permission evaluation through RBAC evaluators \u2192 Folder/Dashboard permission inheritance, with each layer delegating to lower layers for actual permission checks and scope resolution.\"\n}\n",
  "filePath": "/workspace/answer.json",
  "originalFile": null,
  "structuredPatch": [],
  "type": "create"
}
